description: Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the autocomplete functionality in the Finder module 6.x-1.x before 6.x-1.26, 7.x-1.x, and 7.x-2.x before 7.x-2.0-alpha8 for Drupal allows remote attackers to inject arbitrary web script or HTML via the title of a node, a different vulnerability than CVE-2012-1561.
